text:
Explain
® Note
This portion of the specification is only relevant for drivers that provide explain helpers.
When timeouts is specified, drivers MUST provide a way to specify timeoutS that results in maxTimeMS being set on the explain
command. For example, Node's implementation might look like:
collection.find({}).explain({ timeoutMS: 1000 });
I sends:
{ explain: { find: ... }, maxTimeMS: <remaining timeoutMS - min rtt>}
